brand: DIL Daily Intent Lab helps users build consistency through simple daily training planning, execution, and progress tracking.

products.name: Training Board
products.description: Plan daily exercises and tasks, track completion, and maintain consistency.

products.name: Dashboard
products.description: See weekly analytics, streak status, challenge coverage, and badges.

products.name: Guide
products.description: Browse exercise cards with visuals and practical movement tips.

faqs.question: How do I start using DIL?
faqs.answer: Begin on Training Board, add daily exercises, and complete your items to build momentum.

faqs.question: How is streak calculated?
faqs.answer: A streak increments when training days are completed, with optional freeze support if enabled.

faqs.question: Where can I get support?
faqs.answer: Contact support directly by email at kumailhassanpixel@gmail.com.

policies.title: Data privacy
policies.summary: User chat analytics can run in privacy-first mode where message content is hashed and length-only.

policies.title: Account access
policies.summary: Only verified email accounts should access protected dashboard experiences.
